name: SCN-005 | Pass the Hash Lateral Movement
description: Simulates post-compromise lateral movement using NTLM hashes extracted in a prior credential dumping stage. Enumerates network shares to identify targets, narrates SAM hash extraction, then demonstrates Pass the Hash authentication without a plaintext password. Represents the natural continuation of SCN-001 — showing how stolen hashes are weaponized for lateral movement. All native Windows commands + Impacket narration.
